scripts.test:fast: npm run compile && CUCUMBER_TAGS='@fast and not @wip' cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.mjs
scripts.test:slow: npm run compile && cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.mjs --tags '@slow and not @visual and not @wip'
scripts.test:visual:update: npm run compile && UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.mjs --tags '@visual'
scripts.test:features:fast: npm run compile && CUCUMBER_TAGS='@fast and not @wip' cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.mjs
scripts.test:features:slow: npm run compile && CUCUMBER_TAGS='@slow and not @wip' cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.mjs
scripts.test:features:panels: npm run compile && cucumber-js --config features/cucumber.mjs --tags '@J8 or @J9 or @J10'
scripts.video:all: npm run video:record -- v1-track-changes && npm run video:record -- v2-accept-reject && npm run video:record -- v3-comments-threads && npm run video:record -- v4-view-modes
